basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist and Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani
basic_details.post_name: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support-III
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS Kalyani) Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Kalyani. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 10 days from the publication of the advertisement (till 5 PM on Day 10)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Statistics/Public Health/Clinical Research, Three-year graduate degree in relevant subject with three years experience or postgraduate degree
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical): Postgraduate degree, including integrated PG degrees (Life Sciences /Biotechnology /Biochemistry /Microbiology /Statistics / Public Health / Clinical Research) from a recognized university. Project Technical Support-III (PTS-III): Three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field with three years' experience, or postgraduate degree in a relevant subject.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 56,000/- + HRA for Scientist-I, Rs. 28,000/- + HRA for Technical Support-III
salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical): Rs. 56,000/- + HRA Project Technical Support-III (PTS-III): Rs. 28,000/- + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 is 21-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this AIIMS Kalyani recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support-III in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical)?
faq.answer: For the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post, a Postgraduate degree in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Statistics/Public Health/Clinical Research from a recognized university is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Project Technical Support-III?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical Support-III post will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the AIIMS Kalyani recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. You must prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves screening of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Kalyani located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Kalyani is located in Kalyani, West Bengal, with the pincode 741245.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, meaning they are offered on a fixed-term contract basis.
